title: Geoffery
description: Professor Geoffery Zheng is an Assistant Professor of Finance at NYU Shanghai. Professor Zheng earned his Ph.D. at UCLA, along with a Bachelor of Science in Mathematics, a Bachelor of Arts in Economics, and a Bachelor of Arts in Physics from the University of Chicago. Prior to his doctoral studies,
